title: Boysenberry
description: A Vanilla++ modpack which overhauls progression.
body:
# BOYSENBERRY

Boysenberry is a Vanilla++ modpack which aims to overhaul Minecrafts progression and create a longer and more enjoyable gameplay experience. It is currently in its Alpha stage.

## Features
- Overhauled tool progression with Create and Crafttweaker
- Removed Villagers - [You Shall Not Spawn!](https://modrinth.com/mod/you-shall-not-spawn)
- Removed Redstone - [CraftTweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker)
- New technology system - [create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)
- Changed smelting recipes - [CraftTweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker)
- Overhauled terrain - [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
- New mobs
- Overhauled underground - [Spelunkery](https://modrinth.com/mod/spelunkery)
- Cant mine blocks without the correct tool (perfect for multiplayer prisons) - [Use The Tool!](https://modrinth.com/mod/use-the-tool!)
- New respawn system
- Faster horses & horse shoes
- New way of getting to the end
- Higher nether
- Diet system
- Enchantment overhaul
- Removed Durability
- Added Seasons


## Planned Features
- More custom crafting recipes
- Custom structures made specifically for this pack
- Overhauled stronghold
- Custom temples for each eye of ender
- Custom ore generation
- Custom wandering trades
- Custom seasonal crop settings
- Custom Vanity Skins

## Thank You
I would like to thank [Ramixin](https://modrinth.com/user/RamGames) for creating [Use The Tool](https://modrinth.com/mod/use-the-tool!) on my request. I would also like to thank [jaredlll08](https://modrinth.com/user/jaredlll08), thesilkminer and BroFaceMcgee for assisting me with changing recipes using [Crafttweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafttweaker).
